<!-- GENERATED from examples/*.txtar by cmd/gsx-examples — do not edit. -->

```gsx
package views

component Layout(name string) {
	<div>
		<!-- header -->
		<h1>{ name }</h1>
		<!-- a < b -->
	</div>
}
```

Renders:

```html
<div><!-- header --><h1>Ada</h1><!-- a < b --></div>
```
